Brief Description: Unified automation and operations platform designed to provision, manage, and operate data center networks from a single interface. It integrates multiple services to simplify network configuration, operation, and analysis across Cisco Nexus 9000 Series switches, Cisco ACI fabrics, and Cisco Nexus Dashboard itself. The platform is available in physical, virtual, and cloud form factors and provides centralized management, automation, and analytics capabilities for data center networks. Cisco Nexus Dashboard is included with Cisco Nexus 9000 Series switch tiered licensing and serves as a single focal point for managing disparate network configurations and views across multiple switches and data centers. It supports a broad range of operational services such as Nexus Dashboard Orchestrator, Nexus Dashboard Insights, and Nexus Dashboard Fabric Controller (NDFC), and offers extensibility for third-party applications and tools integration

Brief Description: Cisco Email Security Appliance (ESA) is now called "Cisco Secure Email Gateway." Cisco has rebranded the Email Security Appliance (ESA) under the Cisco Secure portfolio, and the product is referred to as Cisco Secure Email Gateway. This is confirmed in Cisco's recent advisories and product documentation, where the term "Cisco Secure Email Gateway (formerly Email Security Appliance-ESA)" is used. The Secure Email Gateway includes advanced threat protection capabilities and is available in physical, virtual, and cloud deployment models. The rebranding aligns with Cisco's broader strategy to unify security products under the "Cisco Secure" brand name
